title: Charred iceberg
description: If you have a retired iceberg salad at the back of your fridge that's too old for an actual salad, in 10 minutes you could make a nice snack. Works great with [Salsa roja tatemada](/recipes/salsa-roja-tatemada/), but could be served with any other sauce you have: [Pesto](/recipes/pesto/), or even a [salad dressing](/recipes/golden-salad-dressing/).
ingredients:
- iceberg salad
  *as much as you have*
- salt
- sesame seeds
steps:
1. Remove the root from the iceberg and cut the iceberg into 2 cm slices, discard the root.
2. Char both sides on a pan without adding oil, on medium-high heat, until softened and burned a bit.
3. Serve with salt, sesame seeds, and any sauce you have.
